channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Japanese snack packages go black-and-white as Iran war depletes ink supply
item.description: Some snack packaging is turning black-and-white because the Iran war disrupts the supply of an ingredient used in colored ink.

item.title: Putin praises Russia's successful test launch of a new ballistic missile
item.description: Russia test-fired a new intercontinental ballistic missile as part of efforts to modernize its nuclear forces.

item.title: A close look at one military family's suspended life amid the ongoing Iran war
item.description: Military life has always involved uncertainty, but the Iran war brings new fear and unknowns for many families.

item.title: War in Iran costs $29 billion so far. And, students are finally improving in math
item.description: Pentagon officials told Congress they estimate the war in Iran has cost $29 billion so far. And, a new Education Scorecard shows U.S. students are improving in math.
